claims.summary: `viscosity_index` exists but may not be actively calculated; high entropy and density-gradient evidence should make thickening structurally visible.
claims.rationale: Added an effective diagnostic viscosity derivation that preserves the raw inbound value and labels the derived source/basis when typed spectral evidence supports thickness.

claims.summary: Mode-packing pressure around 0.28-0.32 should remain distinguishable from portality or distinct-mode separation effects.
claims.rationale: Existing and newly verified pressure/porosity, mode-packing, and smoothing tests keep mode-packing source visibility separate from pressure control or stale heartbeat inference.
